completed_surface: checked text and byte buffer copies
integer assignment blocks with newline and semicolon separators
blank lines and line comments in assignment blocks
per-runtime structured error status, type, message, line, and column
Linux and Windows external C conformance hosts
release_blockers: general PortaPy-owned Python lexer/parser and statement grammar beyond integer assignment blocks

full traceback frame retrieval beyond structured error location
